View

Signal

WPEPlatformView::resized

since: 2.0

Declaration 

void
resized (
  WPEView* self,
  gpointer user_data
)

Description [src]

Emitted when view is resized.

Default handler:

The default handler is called after the handlers added via g_signal_connect().

Available since: 2.0
